fields.description: The property this connection belongs to. HeyKoala provisions a phone number per property.
fields.label: Property

fields.description: First-party is HeyKoala (rock8v2 for voice, HeyKoala Concierge for WhatsApp). Twilio/Retell/Vapi/Meta Business are BYO providers using the same webhook contract.
fields.label: Provider
fields.options:
HeyKoala
Twilio
Retell
Vapi
Meta Business
Custom

fields.description: The number the guest dials or messages. E.164 format (e.g. +919876543210).
fields.label: Phone Number

fields.description: The Agent row this connection dispatches to. Empty falls back to the property's persona-matching agent.
fields.label: Agent

fields.description: The provider-side account or line identifier (e.g. HeyKoala tenant id, Twilio SID).
fields.label: External Account ID

fields.description: HMAC secret Kamra uses to verify inbound webhooks. Rotate freely — the provider is told the new value when they re-connect.
fields.label: Inbound Webhook Secret

fields.description: Where Kamra POSTs outbound replies (voice utterances, WhatsApp messages). Provider-specific; HeyKoala fills this in automatically at connect time.
fields.label: Outbound URL

fields.description: Provider-specific bearer token / API key used for outbound calls. Encrypted at rest.
fields.label: Provider Credentials
